news.title:
Ola Electric's stock rose 6.5% to Rs 32.25 after announcing its LFP 46100 cell progress, set to launch next quarter.
The company plans to scale its Gigafactory to 6 GWh, reducing EV costs and accelerating adoption, despite analysts' cautious outlook.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's stock rose 6.5% to Rs 32.25 after announcing its LFP 46100 cell progress, set to launch next quarter.
The company plans to scale its Gigafactory to 6 GWh, reducing EV costs and accelerating adoption, despite analysts' cautious outlook.

news.title:
Experts advise holding Hindustan Zinc (Rs 533.45) with a target of Rs 670-700 due to strong momentum and valuations.
Ola Electric (Rs 29.18) and Brainbees Solutions (Rs 244.33) flagged for high valuations; NTPC Green Energy (Rs 97.07) holds long-term growth potential.
news.summary:
Experts advise holding Hindustan Zinc (Rs 533.45) with a target of Rs 670-700 due to strong momentum and valuations.
Ola Electric (Rs 29.18) and Brainbees Solutions (Rs 244.33) flagged for high valuations; NTPC Green Energy (Rs 97.07) holds long-term growth potential.

news.title:
Ola Electric CMD unveils new 46100 LFP cell, larger than current NMC.
Launching next quarter, it promises cost reduction, faster EV adoption, and energy product advances.
news.summary:
Ola Electric CMD unveils new 46100 LFP cell, larger than current NMC.
Launching next quarter, it promises cost reduction, faster EV adoption, and energy product advances.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Ola Electric, and Adani Power were top traded stocks on NSE, with notable volume spikes.
Vodafone Idea rose 1% after adding subscribers; Ola Electric surged 7% on strong sales; Adani Power gained 3% post MSEDCL award.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares surged 18% after a Rs. 60,000 price cut on its Roadster bike, driven by Bharat Cell battery success.
Increased demand, Gigafactory expansion, and improved production capacity boosted investor confidence and market momentum.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares surged 18% after a Rs. 60,000 price cut on its Roadster bike, driven by Bharat Cell battery success.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares surged 14.2% to ₹26 on April 1, driven by a 150% YoY rise in March registrations.
Ola became the first Indian EV brand with 1M registrations, but stock remains 83.4% below its all-time high.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares surged 14.2% to ₹26 on April 1, driven by a 150% YoY rise in March registrations.
Ola became the first Indian EV brand with 1M registrations, but stock remains 83.4% below its all-time high.

news.title:
Ola Electric's daily orders exceeded 1,000 units in late March 2026.
Registrations rose 150% MoM to 10,117 units in March, boosting market share.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's daily orders exceeded 1,000 units in late March 2026.
Registrations rose 150% MoM to 10,117 units in March, boosting market share.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.
Vodafone Idea fell 2%, Filatex plunged 6%, while Ola Electric rose 6% amid its EndICEAge campaign.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea, Filatex Fashions, Ola Electric among NSE's most traded stocks, despite market dip.

news.title:
IREDA declares interim dividend of ₹0.6/share; Ola expands Insiders Upgrade Program.
Polyplex to acquire 51% stake in TechNova Printrite for ₹62 cr; EV valued at ₹127.2 cr.
news.summary:
IREDA declares interim dividend of ₹0.6/share; Ola expands Insiders Upgrade Program.
Polyplex to acquire 51% stake in TechNova Printrite for ₹62 cr; EV valued at ₹127.2 cr.

news.title:
Ola Electric reallocates Rs 575 cr from R&D to debt, growth; R&D funds cut to Rs 930 cr.
Company explores Rs 2,000 cr stake sale in Ola Cell; shares fall 5.3% amidst broader market decline.
news.summary:
Ola Electric reallocates Rs 575 cr from R&D to debt, growth; R&D funds cut to Rs 930 cr.
Company explores Rs 2,000 cr stake sale in Ola Cell; shares fall 5.3% amidst broader market decline.

news.title:
Auto PLI disbursements stand at Rs 2,321 cr, under 10% of Rs 25,938 cr.
Over Rs 23,000 cr remains unclaimed with March 2028 deadline nearing.

news.title:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.
JBM Auto, Olectra Greentech, Ather Energy, and Ola Electric saw notable gains, with JBM Auto reversing March losses.
news.summary:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.

news.title: Ola Electric is reportedly facing a cash crunch, raising concerns.
news.summary: Ola Electric is reportedly facing a cash crunch, raising concerns.

news.title:
Ola Electric faces cash crunch due to falling scooter sales, weak balance sheet, and battery strategy shifts.
Plans include ₹2,000 crore stake sale in Ola Cell, key to its capital-intensive battery business growth.
news.summary:
Ola Electric faces cash crunch due to falling scooter sales, weak balance sheet, and battery strategy shifts.
Plans include ₹2,000 crore stake sale in Ola Cell, key to its capital-intensive battery business growth.

news.title:
Citi cuts Ola Electric's TP to ₹22 from ₹27, citing 5–14% FY26–28 revenue cuts.
Concerns include market share loss, slow EV adoption, weak cash flow, & 3.5x FY27E EV/Sales valuation.
news.summary:
Citi cuts Ola Electric's TP to ₹22 from ₹27, citing 5–14% FY26–28 revenue cuts.
Concerns include market share loss, slow EV adoption, weak cash flow, & 3.5x FY27E EV/Sales valuation.
